items.title: Gaming Act 1845 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to amend the Law concerning Games and Wagers.

items.title: Evidence Act 1845
items.description: An Act to facilitate the Admission in Evidence of certain official and other Documents.

items.title: Inclosure Act 1845
items.description: An Act to facilitate the Inclosure and Improvement of Commons and Lands held in common, the Exchange of Lands, and the Division of intermixed Lands ; to provide Remedies for defective or incomplete Executions, and for the Non-execution of the Powers of general and local Inclosure Acts ; and to provide for the Revival of such Powers in certain Cases.

items.title: Small Debts Act 1845 (repealed 1.7.1991)
items.description: An Act for the better securing the Payment of Small Debts.

items.title: Auctioneers Act 1845
items.description: An Act to impose a new duty on the licence to be taken out by all auctioneers in the United Kingdom.

items.title: Companies Clauses Consolidation Act 1845
items.description: An Act for consolidating in One Act certain Provisions usually inserted in Acts with respect to the Constitution of Companies incorporated for carrying on Undertakings of a public Nature.

items.title: Companies Clauses Consolidation (Scotland) Act 1845
items.description: An Act for consolidating in One Act certain Provisions usually inserted in Acts with respect to the Constitution of Companies incorporated for carrying on Undertakings of a public Nature in Scotland.

items.title: Land Clauses Consolidation Act 1845
items.description: An Act for consolidating in One Act certain Provisions usually inserted in Acts authorizing the taking of Lands for Undertakings of a public Nature.

items.title: Lands Clauses Consolidation (Scotland) Act 1845
items.description: An Act for consolidating in one Act certain provisions usually inserted in Acts authorizing the taking of lands for undertakings of a public nature in Scotland.

items.title: Railways Clauses Consolidation Act 1845
items.description: An Act for consolidating in One Act certain Provisions usually inserted in Acts authorizing the making of Railways.

items.title: Railways Clauses Consolidation (Scotland) Act 1845
items.description: An Act for consolidating in One Act certain Provisions usually inserted in Acts authorizing the making of Railways in Scotland.

items.title: Infeftment Act 1845
items.description: An Act to simplify the Form and diminish the Expence of obtaining infeftment in Heritable Property in Scotland.

items.title: Bank Notes (Scotland) Act 1845
items.description: An Act to regulate the Issue of Bank Notes in Scotland.

items.title: Canal Carriers Act 1845
items.description: An Act to enable Canal Companies to become Carriers of Goods upon their Canals.

items.title: Geological Survey Act 1845
items.description: An Act to facilitate the Completion of a Geological Survey of Great Britain and Ireland, under the Direction of the First Commissioner for the Time being of Her Majesty's Woods arid Works

items.title: Libel Act 1845
items.description: An Act to amend an Act passed in the Session of Parliament held in the Sixth and Seventh Years of the Reign of Her present Majesty, intituled An Act to amend the Law respecting defamatory Words and Libel.
